name: Harvester Yeshua Christian School
address: B7 Lot 3A & 3C, Gloriville Subdivision, Purok 2, Buntong Palay, Silangan, San Mateo, 1850 Rizal, Philippines.
tagline: The school focuses on nurturing both academic excellence and spiritual growth, describing itself as a family in Christ
description: Harvester Christian Academy provides a Christ-centered education that develops the whole child — academically, spiritually, and morally. We believe every student is a gift from God with unique God-given potential.

name: Harvester Mission Disciples Academy
address: Harvester Mission Central, San Mateo, Rizal
description: Harvester Bible Institute trains and equips believers for ministry and mission work. With a strong emphasis on Scripture, theology, and practical ministry skills, we raise up the next generation of servant-leaders.
